About Us

Who we are

What is Area 1?

First Love Area 1 is a vibrant community of the First Love Church dedicated to reaching, discipling, and connecting young adults through fellowship, spiritual growth, and evangelism. Area 1 consists of two zones that serve members in different stages of campus life: Jerusalem, the on-campus zone for students at the University of Houston and Texas Southern University with a focus on underclassmen, and Judea, the off-campus zone serving upperclassmen and members living off campus.

Together, these two zones ensure that every member remains connected to the church, continues growing spiritually, builds meaningful relationships, and actively participates in the mission of winning the lost at any cost. Through weekly services, fellowships, outreach, and discipleship, First Love Area 1 seeks to raise a generation of young people who are passionate about God and committed to advancing His Kingdom.

Church Structure

How Area 1 Jerusalem is organized, from the zone lead down to the fellowship leaders.

Area 1 · Jerusalem — leadership structure

The Two Zones

◐ Jerusalem Zone

Jerusalem is the on-campus zone of First Love Area 1, serving students at UH and TSU, with a focus on underclassmen. Jerusalem exists to keep students connected to the church through fellowship, spiritual growth, and outreach. It is a vibrant, youthful community full of life and energy, passionate about God and committed to winning the lost at any cost. The zone gathers for a campus service every week.

◑ Judea Zone

Judea is the off-campus zone of First Love Area 1, serving upperclassmen and members living off campus.

Definitions

Zone

A particular area in which fellowship leaders have targeted outreaches and events.

Zone Lead

The leader and overseer of a specific zone in an area, and of its fellowship leaders.

Fellowship Leader

A leader in an area who has a group of people they are responsible for taking care of. They also outreach, gather, and mobilize people to church on Sundays.

▤  Read the Fellowship Leader Manual
